description:
prime/claim/update accept '--as IDENTITY'. review/close/drop don't, even though review/close write notes attributed to an author and drop releases a claim. Postmortem papercut: agent had to consult the skill guide to remember the BALLS_IDENTITY env-var form.

Add the flag to all three. Plumb through to default_identity fallback in commands/lifecycle.rs. Drop currently doesn't take identity at all — give it one for the release-attribution note.
title: accept --as on review/close/drop for identity consistency
